name: chr18p11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 18 p-arm pericentric flank (18p11.1-18p11.21), the immediate sub-centromeric LCR shoreline on the p-side of the chr18 centromere. Alpha-satellite (D18Z1), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat patches + pericentromeric SD shoreline.
